# test-fsemu-cases.txt -- FS-UAE test suite for head v1.24 (OpenBSD)
# Category 1 (CLI tool) -- minimum 8 tests required
# Generated by test-designer agent

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. FUNCTIONAL TESTS -- one per documented flag/mode
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TEST: Default 10-line output with no flags
CMD: WORK:head WORK:test-head-5lines.txt
EXPECT: alpha
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -n flag limits output to specified count
CMD: WORK:head -n 3 WORK:test-head-5lines.txt
EXPECT: alpha
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -n 1 prints exactly one line
CMD: WORK:head -n 1 WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT: first line
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: Legacy -count syntax (-3) limits output
CMD: WORK:head -3 WORK:test-head-5lines.txt
EXPECT: alpha
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: Legacy -1 syntax prints exactly one line
CMD: WORK:head -1 WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT: first line
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: Multiple files produce ==> header lines
CMD: WORK:head -n 1 WORK:test-head-3lines.txt WORK:test-head-5lines.txt
EXPECT: ==> WORK:test-head-3lines.txt <==
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -n with value larger than file line count prints whole file
CMD: WORK:head -n 100 WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT: first line
EXPECT_RC: 0

# Uses input file instead of piping (ARexx limitation)
TEST: Stdin fallback when no file argument given
CMD: WORK:head -n 2 WORK:test-head-stdin.txt
EXPECT: line one
EXPECT_RC: 0

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. ERROR PATH TESTS
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TEST: Nonexistent file returns error (stderr not captured by ARexx)
CMD: WORK:head WORK:no-such-file-xyz.txt
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: Invalid flag returns error (usage goes to stderr)
CMD: WORK:head -z WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: -n with zero is an invalid count
CMD: WORK:head -n 0 WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT_RC: 10

TEST: -n with non-numeric argument is an invalid count
CMD: WORK:head -n abc WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT_RC: 10

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. EXIT CODE TESTS
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TEST: Successful read of existing file returns RC 0
CMD: WORK:head -n 1 WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT: first line
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: File not found returns RC 10 (RETURN_ERROR)
CMD: WORK:head WORK:nonexistent-head-test.txt
EXPECT_RC: 10

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. EDGE CASE TESTS
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TEST: Empty file produces no output and returns RC 0
CMD: WORK:head WORK:test-empty.txt
EXPECT:
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: Long line file handled correctly (char-by-char read)
CMD: WORK:head -n 1 WORK:test-longline.txt
EXPECT_CONTAINS: MARKER
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: File with fewer lines than default 10 prints all lines
CMD: WORK:head WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT: first line
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: -n equal to exact line count of file prints all lines
CMD: WORK:head -n 3 WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT: first line
EXPECT_RC: 0

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. AMIGA-SPECIFIC TESTS
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TEST: WORK: volume path resolves correctly for single file
CMD: WORK:head -n 1 WORK:test-head-5lines.txt
EXPECT: alpha
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: Multiple WORK: paths in single invocation both resolve
CMD: WORK:head -n 1 WORK:test-head-5lines.txt WORK:test-head-3lines.txt
EXPECT: ==> WORK:test-head-5lines.txt <==
EXPECT_RC: 0

TEST: One valid and one missing file -- partial error (RC 10 from missing)
CMD: WORK:head -n 1 WORK:test-head-3lines.txt WORK:no-such-file-xyz.txt
EXPECT_CONTAINS: first line
EXPECT_RC: 10
